metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex plugins by Sour Old Geezer: skills for code auditing, review, and development workflows, with Claude Code subagents and Codex metadata where supported.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-audit
plugins.description: Rubric-driven audits for DevSecOps posture and test quality, with per-stack extensions, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-design
plugins.description: Reference-driven design skills for sustainable software, responsive web UI, HTTP APIs, and ArchiMate® architecture models. Covers code/module/script boundaries and dependencies, WCAG™ 2.2 AA responsive UI, HTTP API design with Azure® Functions™ runtime, Node.js® hosted/serverless and hosted Next.js™ runtime extensions, Azure® Cosmos DB™ / Azure® Blob Storage™ data extensions, and ArchiMate® 3.2 OEF build/extract/review/render/lookup. Includes canonical-path drift detection, .NET™ / Bicep™ / workflow lifting, deployment topology, trust boundaries, packaged Java™ layout validation, warning evidence, route repair, global polish, OEF materialization, rendered PNG validation, layout policy diagnostics, layout provenance output, change classification, per-view readiness matrix, render-contract disclosure, skill self-check, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

plugins.name: souroldgeezer-ops
plugins.description: Operations skills for issue, work-item, and pull-request lifecycle handling, with provider-agnostic cores and provider-specific extensions.
